name: opl-meta-agent
description: Codex plugin carrier for the OPL Meta Agent domain app.

interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex plugin carrier for OPL Meta Agent while preserving agent-building semantics, target-agent handoff, and owner-gated delivery authority in the domain repo.
defaultPrompt: Use OPL Meta Agent to design or improve an OPL-compatible Foundry Agent.
Use OPL Meta Agent to inspect target-agent handoff, baseline, or delivery gate evidence.
